Design_Description: Replace 70-query decoder with 22-query body-only decoder; zero-pad output to (B, 70, 3) with no-gradient padding.
22-query body decoder; recover hand predictions (B,48,3) via `Linear(22*hidden_dim, 48*3)`; auxiliary hand loss weight 0.1.
22-query body decoder; recover hand predictions via 2-layer MLP `Linear(22*hidden_dim, hidden_dim) → GELU → Linear(hidden_dim, 48*3)`; auxiliary hand loss weight 0.3.
